CONTENT.Career: In 2012, Prior made his debut for Girondins de Bordeaux II. He made his Ligue 1 debut at 15 August 2015 in a 1–1 draw against AS Saint-Étienne.In February 2019, he signed for Miedź Legnica of the Polish Ekstraklasa on loan until the end of the 2018–19 season.In July 2019, Prior joined Ligue 2 club Valenciennes. On 14 August 2021, he moved abroad and signed a one-year deal with Spanish Segunda División side Cartagena.On 29 June 2022, Prior signed a three-year contract with PAS Giannina.In May 2024, Prior signed a pre-contract with Scottish side Livingston on an initial one-year-deal, with an automatic one-year extension triggered by promotion.

SUMMARY: Jérôme Yashin Prior (born 8 August 1995) is a French professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Scottish Championship club Livingston.
